title: clerodendrum tatei
intro: Clerodendrum tatei, also known as the 'Katuk' plant, is a tropical plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum tatei include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and anticancer properties. Clerodendrum tatei can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
